## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, address feedback, and plan for upcoming Metronome Pricing Index project.](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift from outlines to full drafts for more efficient content production and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Pricing Index project requires programmatic SEO approach with template design, data sourcing, and pipeline development](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide seed list of authoritative sources; Metronome team to supplement](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Action item: Schedule template design discussion for Pricing Index project](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Process Improvements

  - [Shift from outlines to full article drafts to streamline workflow and enable better fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement post-processing workflows for verifying sources, statistics, and quotes](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Aim to generate content 3-4 weeks ahead of schedule for flexibility and feedback incorporation](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)

### Authoritative Source List Development

  - [GrowthX to create initial seed list of \~24 authoritative sources across relevant domains](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Metronome team to review, rank, and supplement the list](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Goal: Improve link quality and brand alignment in content](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Pricing Index Project Overview

  - [Structured format similar to DeepGram's AI app review](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Key components: pricing model categorization, product overview, pricing snapshot, model analysis, historical changes, and customer sentiment](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Data sources: official pricing pages, documentation, and public discussions (e.g., Reddit, Hacker News)](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Objective: Provide easy-to-understand pricing strategy insights for prospects and customers](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)

### Pricing Index Execution Strategy

  - [Treat as a programmatic SEO engagement with multiple data sources and content generation pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Key components needed: template, data sources, content generation pipelines, assembly pipeline, and publishing/staging pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [GrowthX to assess scope, resource requirements, and potential tooling needs](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Initial focus on editorial content for first 10-20 entries, with scalable system development for larger dataset](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review and return current batch of article drafts by this afternoon](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Matthew to investigate recurring stat issue in recent content](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [GrowthX to create seed list of authoritative sources for Metronome review](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Matthew to discuss Pricing Index project scope with team and provide timeline estimates](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Megan to set up template design discussion for Pricing Index project](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Metronome team to provide criteria for assessing pricing strategies in Pricing Index](https://fathom.video/share/K_xzaEoMJ4TSkJHb2jH-_TNnAzT7yvmA?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
